name: coding-agents
description: Coding Agents explicit-only legacy workflow for its source CLI and existing .coding-agents state. Select only when the user names Coding Agents/coding-agents or asks to continue, audit, or repair that state or CLI. Primary route: explicit Coding Agents workflow. Fallback: normal coding/subagent tools for generic coding, debug, source changes, delegation, and subagent coordination.

interface.shortDescription: Explicit-only legacy Coding Agents workflow for named use or existing .coding-agents state/CLI continuation, audit, or repair.
interface.longDescription: Discovery is intentionally explicit-only. Select only when the user names Coding Agents/coding-agents or asks to continue, audit, or repair existing .coding-agents state or the Coding Agents source CLI. Do not auto-route generic coding, debugging or repair, source changes, delegation, multi-agent work, or subagent coordination. Once explicitly selected, the existing intake, assign, collect, finalize, run, orchestrate, handoff, and audit CLI functionality remains unchanged.
defaultPrompt: Use Coding Agents explicitly because I named Coding Agents/coding-agents.
Continue, audit, or repair this existing .coding-agents state or Coding Agents source CLI.
